name: Vehicle Wheel Lockout Device
shortDescription: Metal wheel clamp for two- and four-wheeler lockout during repair or theft prevention.
longDescription: A front-handle metal lockout device that clamps over a vehicle wheel, usable on both two-wheelers and four-wheelers. A dedicated two-wheeler version adds a cable to wrap the wheel plus a premier 38mm hasp, giving three separate locking points for stronger anti-theft or maintenance-lockout security.

images.alt: Vehicle Wheel Lockout Device supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
